ProLuxe Travel

By introduction

An office on hand for the principal, the team, and the conferences.

One trip or a full conference programme. Principal alone or with team. The booker passes the work across and the desk takes it on.

From the founder

By introduction. By hand.

A note from Myles ↓

ProLuxe Travel exists for a small number of principals whose travel cannot afford to fail.

After 20 years on the floor of luxury hotels, the work narrows to two things: who the office knows, and being there when it matters. By the time the principal arrives, the people at the hotel who matter already know them. The room is as it should be before anyone asks.

Whether the principal travels alone or with 20, the work runs through Bureau by ProLuxe. One console for the office, a personal sign-in link for each guest. The desk uses it for a principal's office and for a full conference programme.

Where a principal travels with a protection team, the work runs through Bureau by ProLuxe. Principal and team on one booking, rooms close to each other rather than scattered across the city. Hotel contacts at director level allow the placement to be agreed directly, not through a call centre. One point of contact across both halves of the trip. The desk uses it for operations and for a principal's office.

The shape of the work changes with the principal. The standards do not.

The office would be glad to be on hand. If it would help, please write.

Write to Myles
For a principal's office For EAs and chiefs of staff For a conference programme For event managers and group bookers

With my best regards,

Myles Longfield

Founder, ProLuxe Travel

London, May 2026

myles@proluxetravels.com
